BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin after the landlord hinted office rent at Rangers Avenue may rise at the next renewal. Pre year-end review.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Revisit with the accountant once 2026 H1 actuals are closed.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Office rent increases to NGN 180,000/mo at renewal
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs 1,163,000 + 30,000 increase = 1,193,000. At ~380,000 average fee per active project, need roughly 3.2 active billable projects to cover.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Minimal. Comfortable at current 4-5 active projects.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case - rent to NGN 220,000/mo (unlikely)
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Still fine. Wanted to stress test against a steep increase.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is about 3-4 active billable projects per month at the current cost structure. With the pipeline running 4-5 projects we have healthy headroom. Main risk is slow public-sector payment, not cost.
ActionItems: Confirm renewal terms with Rangers Avenue Lettings before September
Revisit after H1 close with the accountant for proper modelling
